latestIgtvVideos.title: Media unit reveal
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
Absolutely love this new unit we had built to fit this space, I wanted something simple & bright but with plenty of storage space 

This room used to be some of the old lounge, now it is a new family happy space 

So close to being finished but I thought I would share a little little snippet of what we have so far 

Hope you are all having a fabulous day 💖

#renovation #storage #happyspace #colourful #mediaunit #simplestyle #homerenovation #homestyling #queenofclean #positivity #homedecor #homedesign #homesweethome

Happy Thursday everyone it is time for a speed clean!
 
And guess what, I am using a fabulous brand-new range called WYX….. these hi-tech disinfectants are already a best seller across Europe and I’ve loved putting them through their paces in every room of the house over past few weeks. 

@wyxclean gets to work super quickly, making them brilliant for my 5 minute room cleans.  The products cut through household  dirt and grime effortlessly, giving me enough time to target those high traffic germ hotspots such as the light switches, door handles and electricals. 

And the really great news is that WYX kills viruses (including coronavirus) , bacteria and fungi.  This clever brand is also suitable for vegans and has NOT been tested on animals. 
 
The full range of 4 cleaning & laundry disinfectant products are now available in @Aldiuk and @Waitrose and includes these must haves that I’ve been absolutely loving: 
 
WYX Disinfectant bathroom cleaner 

WYX Disinfectant kitchen cleaner

WYX Disinfectant Multi-purpose cleaner 

WYX Disinfectant laundry cleanser in two available sizes
 

I know you’re going to love them as much as I do! 
 
For more information on this fabulous new range  follow their insta page @wyxclean and  keep an eye out for them in store.

Hope you like my video!
 
Wishing you all a fabulous day ahead

#AD #speedclean #clean #cleaning #housework #5minute #spotless #killsgerms #coronavirus #covid19 #newproduct #disinfectant #aldi #waitrose #cleaningproduct

latestIgtvVideos.title: ✨Happy April 1st✨
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
Although we are now one week into my Spring Cleaning Challenge. April to me really is my big Spring Cleaning month .

Outside the beautiful flowers have popped, the sky is bluer and the sun is beginning to shine .

I have put together this video with the help of @swanbranduk to give you room by room steps on how to achieve the perfect spring clean .

Don’t forget housework is about team work, so with the kids at home  give them manageable tasks to keep them busy .

It’s day 7 of the challenge today, time to sort out your medicine cupboard, tidy, stock check and check dates .

Happy Cleaning .
.
.
.
#springcleaning #springclean #clean #tidy #housework #teamwork #dust #vacuum #cleanwithme #queenofclean #cleaningtips #swan #brandambassador

latestIgtvVideos.title: Reduce risk of Coronavirus
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
One of the most popular messages in my inbox at the moment is about food shopping .

Do you wash it or don’t you wash it? .

As we now know Coronavirus can live for UP TO 9 days on many surfaces including food packaging .

My food came earlier today and here I show how I brought it into my house .

This will feel extreme but for all my worried anxious followers .

Lets try and stop this virus and please be kind 💖💖
.
.
#coronavirus #covid_19 #reducerisk #foodshopping #groceries #groceryshopping #toptips #queenofclean

latestIgtvVideos.title: Washing your hands when out and about
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
I was sent this fabulous tip by @theprivatenurse earlier in the week and have been desperate to share it with you .

Such a fabulous idea for when you are out and about 
Just keep in your car or in your hand so you always can wash your hands .

PS - This is just a quick demo but don’t forget to take at least 20 seconds to wash your hands focusing on backs of hands, wrists and in between your fingers and thumb . . 
T shirt is from @diskokids . .

#handwashing #covid_19 #keepclean #besafe #queenofclean

latestIgtvVideos.title: Home made hand sanitizer
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
✨✨✨✨✨ .

CV-19 is a virus. Alcohol is both anti-bacterial and anti-viral .

Buying a hand sanitizer with 60% alcohol is definitely the best option but if you can’t get your hands on any , here is how to make your own at home using such a simple process until they come back on the shelves again .

But ultimately handwashing is your best option .

I appreciate this isn’t for everyone but sharing through demand from my followers .

PS - I RECYCLE bottles the rubbing alcohol product I am using is at 60% alcohol along with the aloe Vera and tea tree
.
#demo #homemade #sanitizer #queenofclean #virus

latestPosts.caption:
As you know, I’m not just the Queen of Clean… I’m the Queen of Lemons too! 🍋✨

I absolutely love cleaning with a juicy lemon, so I’ve put together some of my favourite lemon-cleaning tips for you.

Have a scroll through and let me know which tip is your favourite! 🍋💛

#QueenOfClean #CleaningHacks #LemonCleaning #NaturalCleaning #CleaningTips

Washing machine rubber seal looking a little grubby? Try these two simple cleaning methods! ✨

Bicarbonate of soda paste + a small scrubbing brush to lift dirt and build-up from the seal.

For mould and mildew marks, soak kitchen roll in white vinegar and place it over the affected area for around 15 minutes before removing and running a rinse cycle.

A quick note: vinegar is acidic, but using it occasionally and for a short period like this is generally fine for the rubber seal. I wouldn’t leave it on for hours or use it excessively, and always follow with a rinse cycle afterwards. 🫧

These quick jobs make such a difference and help keep your machine looking and smelling fresh. ✨

Save this for your next washing machine refresh and let me know if you try it! 🤍

#CleaningTips #WashingMachineCleaning #LaundryTips #HomeCleaning #CleaningHack

Nothing beats the feeling of fresh bedding after a busy week 🛏️✨AD 

I finally gave my bedroom a much-needed reset and switched up my bedding with this gorgeous 500 thread count Egyptian cotton set from @hamptonandastley. The quality is incredible, soft, crisp, luxurious and that hotel-bed feeling at home 🤍

I always wash new bedding before using it and these luxurious sets lift the whole room instantly. 

If you’re thinking about upgrading your bedding for June there is a HUGE 50% off PLUS you can SAVE a further 15% with code QUEEN 

Link in stories or comment LINK 💖

#BedroomRefresh #SundayReset #FreshBedding #QueenOfClean

Cleaning Myths Busted! 🧽

Come with me as I put some of the most common cleaning myths to the test and separate fact from fiction!

Some of these might surprise you… 👀

Which one did you always think was true? Let me know in the comments below! ⬇️✨

Outfit @oliverbonas 
Shoes @marksandspencer

#CleaningTips #CleaningMyths #QueenOfClean #HomeHacks #CleaningHacks

5 Kitchen Mistakes You Could Be Making 🚨

Think your kitchen is clean? Some everyday habits could actually be making it harder to keep spotless and hygienic! 🧽✨

Which one are you guilty of?⬇️ 

Be honest – we all have one! 😂

#KitchenCleaning #CleaningTips #HomeHacks #KitchenHacks #CleanHome

Lisbon sightseeing with a fashion influencer means every landmark turns into a photoshoot. 📸😂 

I was told to pose by @40plusnotgivingupyet so I posed 😂 

Dress @riverisland 

#lisbon #sightseeing #queenofclean

Thankfully I got this space cleaned up before the heatwave ☀️ The garden always opens up as an extra living space this time of year and I love making the most of it 🌿

The patio and table were covered in sticky sap and there was so much bird mess everywhere… honestly it drives me mad 😂 

But after a good scrub it’s all looking fresh, clean and ready for sunny days ahead 🙌✨

Products used @cif_uki outdoor cream cleaner, @teepol_products patio cleaner, bird mess spray and good old warm soapy water 

#gardencleanup #patioclean #freshenup

Heatwave hack ☀️❄️

Pop your bed sheet into a plastic covering and place it in the freezer for 15 minutes before bed for a lovely cool night’s sleep 💤

#heatwavehack #summerhack #queenofclean

Question time… Marks & Spencer edition 👀✨

I absolutely love filming these videos and having a little browse through all the bits in store 🛍️💖 

Hope you enjoy watching them as much as I enjoy making them! Let me know what caught your eye the most 👇 

#MandS #QuestionTime #ShoppingFinds #LynseyQueenOfClean #QueenOfClean

Five Simple Toilet Tuesday Hacks 🚽👇

✨ Bicarb — Great for absorbing odours and lifting grime naturally.

🥤 Coke — The acidity helps break down limescale and stubborn stains.

🦷 Denture tablets — Designed to fizz away bacteria and stains, so they work brilliantly in the loo too.

🫧 Mouthwash — Helps freshen the toilet and leaves it smelling minty clean.

🧴 Washing up liquid — Cuts through grease and grime whilst helping leave the bowl shiny.

Which one have you tried before? 👀

#toilettuesday #toiletcleaning #toilettips #queenofclean
